ab: naqunian su matiw sa papay?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: pasaqay iku tu qitun matiw sa papay.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: naqunian su matiw ta sapaisingan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: semaqay iku matiw ta sapaisingan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: naqunian su matiw sa punghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: mezaqis iku tu hikuki matiw sa punghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: naqunian su matiw sa punghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: mezaqis iku tu bawa’ matiw sa punghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: niana zaqisan su temanan?
en: How do you go home?

ab: mezaqis iku tu ciyeyun temanan.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: ipay, niana zaqisan su matiw sa taqsian?
en: How does ipay go to school?

ab: mezaqis tu gasuling ti ipay matiw sa taqsian.
en: ipay goes to school by train.

ab: utay, niana zaqisan su matiw sa kiyukay?
en: How does utay go to church?

ab: qazitinsia ti utay matiw sa kiyukay.
en: utay goes to church by bicycle.

ab: mezaqis isu tu ciyeyun temaqsi ni?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ussa, mezaqis iku tu basu temaqsi.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: qazitinsia isu temaqsi ni?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: en, qazitinsia iku temaqsi.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: mezaqis isu tu kawtiye matiw sa kawsiyung ni?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: en, mezaqis iku tu kawtiye matiw sa kawsiyung.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: matiw isu sa taitung mezaqis isu tu gasuling uu hikuki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: mezaqis iku tu hikuki, mezaqis tu hikuki meqasiRma tu gasuling.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: matiw isu sa kiyukay mezaqis tu basu uu pasaqay tu qitun?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: pasaqay iku tu qitun matiw sa kiyukay, pasaqay tu qitun simunangma tu mezaqis tu basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: mezaki tu leppaw numi ya cawse ni?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: mai mezaki, qautubay iku matiw sa cawse.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: yubin seRay taqsian mezaki ni?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: mezaki, semaqay maseq ti.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: qizuanan qeman mezaki tu teqezan na qitun ni?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: melusit ta teqezan na qitun semaqay tu ulima tunek na duki maseq ti.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
